title: Exact Online next URL returns null
symptom: When using pagination in the Exact Online node, the next URL is returning 'null' despite having more pages available.
root_cause: The Exact Online API uses different property names for pagination than expected. The expression used to extract the next URL is incorrect, leading to a null response when there are more pages to fetch.
fix_steps: Change the Pagination Mode to 'Response Contains Next URL'.
Update the Next URL expression to correctly reference the next page URL: {{ ($response.body.d && $response.body.d.__next) || ($response.body.d && $response.body.d['__next']) || null }}.
Set the complete expression to evaluate if there are more pages: {{ ($response.body.d && $response.body.d.__next) ? false : true }}.
agent_instruction: Update the pagination settings and expressions in the Exact Online node as specified.
